title: Ironclad parts catalog pre-press audit: merge-proof render, spec-row extraction + CSV cross-check, overset/missing-field findings report
one_line_ask: Render our authored InDesign parts-catalog template against the master parts CSV into a proof, then audit it page by page — read back every printed spec row, cross-check it against the source data, and hand back a flagged-pages findings note (each defective page keyed to its issue) plus a findings report calling out overset/clipped part numbers, blank spec cells, and section-count mismatches before we send ~100 pages to print.

issues: Checkerboard transparency pattern is visible, but this is acceptable for a source PNG asset. No major composition or rendering issues. Artwork is flat, front-on, and horizontal. Colors and icon match brief. Minor: logo is not perfectly vertically centered in the frame, but this is minor for a source asset.
Slight export halo visible around icon mark edges — acceptable for source file
Background appears as checkerboard transparency pattern rather than true transparent PNG, but this is likely a preview rendering artifact

assets.name: parts_catalog_template.indd
assets.note: Client-provided .indd template; represented here as an authored text proxy (binary Adobe format not synthesizable).
